_comment: Act 2 / Challenge 2.2 — The Sorting Machine (merchant/buttons). Loaded by beacon firmware at /spiffs/challenge_2_2.json. Consumed by beacon firmware AND sim/index.ts.
landmark: USPS Bulk Mail Center (3D-printed sorting machine prop)

timing._comment: How long the badge has to complete the full session before the machine 'locks' and the operative must walk away and re-approach.
timing._comment2: Per-sequence input window: how long the badge can sit mid-combo before the machine resets the in-progress sequence.

merchant_combos._comment: Each entry is a trade tier. 'sequence' must match impl/act2-2-sorting-machine.ts TRADE_TIERS exactly (server is authoritative for validation; this is the display/UX config).

display._comment: Short strings for any small OLED/LED on the 3D-printed prop.
display.idle:
USPS SORTING
Enter code to trade

espnow._comment: ESP-NOW configuration hints for the beacon firmware. The beacon advertises challengeId '2.2' in BEACON_HELLO.

sim._comment: Settings consumed by sim/index.ts software beacon simulator.
sim._comment_location: Approximate coordinates of the Chicago Main Post Office (433 W Harrison St) for festival map pin.

custom.prop_notes: 3D-print the USPS sorting machine shell. Mount an ESP32-C3 inside. Use the 6-button badge as the 'control panel'. LED strip (white/red) indicates locked/unlocked state. Optional: small OLED I2C display showing current tier status.
custom.audio_cues: Optional buzzer: short beep on button press, ascending tones on correct sequence, descending tones + long buzz on wrong sequence, triple beep on trade completion.
